title: A Distant Shore
article_text: A distant shore was situate beyond the harbor, and a stranger sat in the shade of a tree. The man would swear that he saw a grain of gold in the sand, but uncertainty made him sigh. The probability of finding treasure was low, so he decided to summarize his thoughts. A sudden snap of a branch made him leap with excitement. He felt a monthly payment was not enough for his leather bag. The bag would comprise all items from his storage, including a book about the universe. A refugee from a nearby town came to the shore, and the two men began to stir the sand together. The pregnancy of the stranger's wife added to his urgency, but he could not chase the dream. The comedy of the situation made them laugh, and they shared a moment of joy. Not only did they find a small treasure, but they also found a new friend that day.

sentences.en: A distant shore was situate beyond the harbor, and a stranger sat in the shade of a tree.
sentences.zh: 一个遥远的海岸位于港口之外，一个陌生人坐在树荫下。

Which word means 'to jump high or a long way'?
Which word means 'to consist of or include something'?
Which word means 'a person who leaves their home because of danger'?

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'happening or done every month'?

image_prompts: A distant shore with a harbor in the background, a stranger sitting under a tree in the shade.
A man looking at a tiny grain of gold in the sand, with a thoughtful expression and a sigh.
The same man sitting with a piece of paper, writing a summary, with a low probability sign nearby.
A branch snapping suddenly, making a man leap up with excitement.
A man holding a leather bag, with a monthly payment calendar next to him.
A bag open on the ground, containing items from a storage room, including a book about the universe.
A refugee arriving at the shore, joining another man to stir the sand with their hands.
A pregnant woman standing in the distance, with a man looking urgent but unable to chase a dream.
Two men laughing together in a comedic scene on the shore.
Two men holding a small treasure chest and shaking hands as friends, with the shore and harbor behind them.
